queries.question: What are the eligibility criteria required for this loan?
queries.sql: Select Loans.LoanID, EligibilityAndDocuments.Eligibility_Criteria    From EligibilityAndDocuments JOIN Loans ON Loans.LoanID = EligibilityAndDocuments.LoanId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?loanid ?eligibility_criteria WHERE {
  ?eligibilityanddocuments a :EligibilityAndDocuments .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?loans p:LoanID ?loanid .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:Eligibility_Criteria ?eligibility_criteria .
}

queries.question: What are the necessary documents required for this loan?
queries.sql: Select Loans.LoanID, EligibilityAndDocuments.Documentation_Requirements    From EligibilityAndDocuments JOIN Loans ON Loans.LoanID = EligibilityAndDocuments.LoanId
queries.sparql:

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?loanid ?documentation_requirements WHERE {
  ?eligibilityanddocuments a :EligibilityAndDocuments .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?loans p:LoanID ?loanid .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:Documentation_Requirements ?documentation_requirements .
}

queries.question: What were the requirements for each loan.
queries.sql: Select Loans.LoanID, EligibilityAndDocuments.Eligibility_Criteria, Documentation_Requirements    From EligibilityAndDocuments JOIN Loans ON Loans.LoanID = EligibilityAndDocuments.LoanId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?loanid ?eligibility_criteria ?documentation_requirements WHERE {
  ?eligibilityanddocuments a :EligibilityAndDocuments .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?loans p:LoanID ?loanid .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:Eligibility_Criteria ?eligibility_criteria .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:Documentation_Requirements ?documentation_requirements .
}

queries.question: Which loans met the approval status and what were the requirements
queries.sql: Select Loans.LoanID, EligibilityAndDocuments.Eligibility_Criteria    From EligibilityAndDocuments JOIN Loans ON Loans.LoanID = EligibilityAndDocuments.LoanId Where Loans.Status = 'Approved'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?loanid ?eligibility_criteria WHERE {
  ?eligibilityanddocuments a :EligibilityAndDocuments .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?loans p:LoanID ?loanid .
  ?eligibilityanddocuments p:Eligibility_Criteria ?eligibility_criteria .
  ?loans p:Status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Approved")
}
